metadata.seed: Yeah, I just feel like you're the only one that can help me, you know, I mean, my boyfriend, like, things aren't going well with him. I thought he could help me, but I guess he can't. And I think he's running around on me and all that. So I was just like, well, let me reach out to doctor Grande and see if it can help me, because it seems like my last resort.

patient.query: Yeah, I just feel like you're the only one that can help me, you know, I mean, my boyfriend, like, things aren't going well with him. I thought he could help me, but I guess he can't. And I think he's running around on me and all that. So I was just like, well, let me reach out to doctor Grande and see if it can help me, because it seems like my last resort.

triggers: things aren't going well with boyfriend

llm_response.response:
REASONING:
"retrieved_concepts_used": ["automatic_thoughts", "emotions"]

Your boyfriend and I seem to be having some issues, and it's left you feeling quite frustrated and helpless. It sounds like you might be assuming that he can't help you, which could be contributing to your feelings of desperation. Let's explore these thoughts together and see if we can find a different perspective.

patient.query: Yeah, it’s just… I don’t know, it feels like I’m always the one trying to get him to understand where I’m coming from. I just wish he would see things from my side sometimes. It’s like I keep reaching out, but he just doesn’t get it, and that makes me feel really alone in all of this.

triggers: trying to get him to understand
automatic_thoughts: I wish he would see things from my side

llm_response.response:
REASONING:
"retrieved_concepts_used": ["automatic_thoughts", "emotions"]

<therapist message>
It sounds like you're feeling quite isolated and frustrated because it seems challenging to get him to understand your perspective. I can see why that might make you feel alone. Let's explore together if there are ways we can help bridge this gap between you two.

patient.query: Yeah, I guess I just want to feel heard, you know? It’s hard when I’m putting myself out there and it feels like he’s just not listening. Sometimes I wonder if I'm asking for too much or if I’m just not communicating right. It’s just… exhausting.

automatic_thoughts: wonder if I'm asking for too much
wonder if I’m just not communicating right

entailment: Fear of saying the wrong thing (finding)

llm_response.response:
REASONING:
"retrieved_concepts_used": ["automatic_thoughts", "emotions"]

Your message: I feel like I'm putting myself out there and he's just not listening. Sometimes I wonder if I'm asking for too much or if I’m just not communicating right. It’s just… exhausting.

I understand that you're feeling frustrated and exhausted because it seems like your efforts to communicate aren't being heard. Let's explore these feelings together, and we can work on finding ways to improve communication in your relationship.

patient.query: Yeah, I guess it is frustrating. I just keep thinking that if I try harder, maybe things will change. But then it feels like I’m the only one putting in the effort, and that makes me feel really defeated. I don’t want to feel this way, but it’s just... so draining.

automatic_thoughts: if I try harder, maybe things will change
I’m the only one putting in the effort

llm_response.response:
REASONING:
"retrieved_concepts_used": ["emotions", "automatic thoughts"]

Your response:
It sounds like you're feeling quite frustrated and defeated. It's understandable to feel that way when it seems like only you are putting in the effort. Let's explore together if there might be other ways to approach this situation or shift your perspective.

patient.query: Yeah, I mean, I guess I do feel really frustrated. It’s just hard to see how I could even change my approach when I feel so stuck. Sometimes I think it would be easier if I just didn’t care so much, but I can’t help it. I really want to make things work.

automatic_thoughts: It would be easier if I didn't care so much
I really want to make things work

llm_response.response:
REASONING:
"retrieved_concepts_used": ["automatic_thoughts", "emotions"]

Your response:
I understand that you're feeling frustrated and stuck right now, and it can be tough when we feel like we can't change our approach. It's important to remember that everyone gets stuck sometimes, and it's okay to take a step back and reevaluate. Let's explore some ways you might be able to shift your perspective and find new solutions.

patient.query: I appreciate that, but it’s just... I really feel like I’ve tried a lot already. It’s hard to believe that stepping back will help when it feels like I've been in this same place for so long. Sometimes, I wonder if I’m just not meant to connect with him the way I want to.

llm_response.response:
REASONING:
"retrieved_concepts_used": ["automatic_thoughts", "emotions"]

Your message suggests feelings of frustration and doubt due to a belief that taking a step back won't help, and questioning whether you are meant to connect with someone.

RESPONSE:
I understand how difficult it can feel like you've been stuck for a long time. It's important to acknowledge the effort you've put in so far. Let's explore together if there might be alternative ways to approach this situation that could bring about change.

patient.query: I guess I feel like I’ve put in so much effort already. It’s hard to picture stepping back when it feels like I’m just stuck in this same place. Sometimes I wonder if I’m just not meant to connect with him the way I want to. It really makes me question everything.

llm_response.response:
REASONING:
"retrieved_concepts_used": ["triggers", "automatic thoughts", "emotions"]

Your response:
It sounds like you've been putting in a lot of effort, and it can be frustrating when things don't seem to change. It's natural to question why things aren't working out the way you want them to. Let's explore these feelings together and see if we can find some new perspectives on your situation.

patient.query: Yeah, it’s definitely frustrating. I feel like I’m just going in circles, and I don’t know how to break out of it. I want to find a way forward, but it’s hard when I feel so stuck and unsure of what to do next. Sometimes I just feel like giving up.

automatic_thoughts: I don't know how to break out of it
I feel stuck and unsure of what to do next

llm_response.response:
REASONING:
"retrieved_concepts_used": ["automatic_thoughts", "emotions"]

Your response:
I understand that you're feeling frustrated and stuck, like you're going in circles and unsure of what to do next. It can be challenging when we feel this way, but remember that it's okay to take things one step at a time. Let's explore some options together to help you move forward.

patient.query: I appreciate that, but it’s just... I feel overwhelmed by all of this. Sometimes, it feels like every little step I take is just another chance to get it wrong. I wish I could just see a clear path, but it’s hard to feel hopeful when everything seems so tangled up.

entailment: Loss of hope for the future (finding)

llm_response.response:
REASONING:
"retrieved_concepts_used": ["automatic_thoughts", "emotions"]

Your thoughts about making mistakes and feeling overwhelmed are understandable. It's common to feel this way when things seem complex and uncertain. Let's explore these feelings together, and we can work on finding ways to manage them more effectively.
